reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with a safer high-level compliance scope, clearer workflow guidance, and stronger use of official sources.
strengths: The article now stays at the right altitude for a compliance overview and avoids pretending to give item-specific legal conclusions.
It uses current official sources and dates to frame the 2024 dual-use regulatory changes accurately.
The workflow and escalation sections are useful for project planning without crossing into legal advice.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable under the stricter rubric. It is more current, more careful, and more operationally useful than the earlier short checklist.
